author: @ambersmith6517
text: This is a PERFECT channel to teach children !!!!!!!  and adults!  There is so many that home school now days  I dont know if there is enough people that would pay for a few lessons a week  from Prof Smith or not  I know your reg vids can be used for this as is  But with alot of tight budgets if you did it specifically for home schooled kids  And gave out a month ahead of time list of things child needs maybe it would work  Tight budget parents already spend money on on line no since for there children!  If they say they dont they are lying even the tightest budgets !!!!  A online prescription to Prof Smiths at class would look good by anyone's standards  Maybe I am just a dreamer but I do think this is a part of YOUR calling  Kids would like you also because you dont have a stick up your ass  Kids can spot fakes a mill away  Chuck Norris did this with martial arts classes in fort worth years ago when I lived in TX  So why not one of the worlds best true scientist?

author: @dr.froghopper6711
text: I’m 67 years old and totally disabled. I can no longer hold employment. Everyone tells me to sit back and enjoy it. I think they need to stop doing drugs. I have a very active mind and a complete inability to drive. I’m dependent on someone else to go anywhere. But I have access to the internet and the ability to learn. I’ve learned to cultivate my own garden, my own gourmet mushrooms and, now, I’m learning how to brew beer, wine and mead. I have food and water and I can make my drink from them. I can grow some of my own food. I’m disabled but I’m nowhere near dead! You’re only dead when you cease to learn!

replies.author: @joejoejoejoejoejoe4391

never stop learning and growing. stay on your purpose.

author: @philip5940
text: Yes , those piano accordion bellows you so easily seemed to be able to knock up were a basis for a business idea . The demand is for concertinas rather than piano accordions at folk music festivals. The market for ceramic kilns as you fabricated  one seemed to peak during covid lockdowns .  You produced a rub on copper plating paste for stainless steel suitable for door handles of hospitals considering the anti viral/bacterial/fungal properties. There's more ..
